title: armeria maritima subsp. villosa
intro: Armeria maritima subsp. villosa, also known as Sea Thrift, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family and is native to the coastal regions of Europe and North Africa. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, particularly for its expectorant properties, which help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Armeria maritima subsp. villosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of this plant are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal properties.
